CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. If this is a resale to a buyer with a Service File, this will be copied from the buyer's Service File when you click Sync Buyer/Seller Data. Enter here only if there is no buyer service file. You should also create a corresponding appraisal record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this is a resale to a buyer with a Service File, this will be copied from the buyer's Service File when you click Sync Buyer/Seller Data. Enter here only if there is no buyer service file. You should also create a corresponding appraisal record.
CustomField.label: Unrestricted Market Value at Resale
